team.date_founded: Founded by the deep-extraction crews of a belt mining colony, who drill for every advantage.
team.number_of_fans: Around 14 million relentless, blue-collar belt supporters.
team.badge: A spinning drill-bit boring into ore, sparks scattering.
team.home_kit: Hi-vis amber and black with a drill-tread pattern.
team.third_kit: Deep-shaft grey with an amber bit-line.
team.history: Solar Miners drill for every inch of the pitch — a relentless high-pressing side that hounds opponents into the ground and never, ever lets up. Pure work-rate as a philosophy, the most exhausting team in the belt to face.
team.club_culture: Relentless, blue-collar, and proud of the graft. The Drillers believe effort is non-negotiable.
team.political_leaning: Belt labour-militant — a miners' union club with a chip on its shoulder.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for running better-resourced sides into exhaustion
legends: Bore Vask — the midfielder who reputedly never stopped running
achievements: Most pressures applied in the belt

stadium.date_built: A rough frontier ground built at the extraction site.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the colony's drilling and extraction crews.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, churned hard by the relentless pressing game.
stadium.bio: The Dig is a rough, raucous frontier ground where the crowd works as hard as the team. Away sides leave with empty legs and, usually, empty hands.

training_facility.date_built: A basic facility at the extraction camp.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded on a shoestring by the drilling crews.
training_facility.bio: The Extraction Athletic Campus drills work-rate above all — the Drillers' relentless press is built on conditioning so brutal that opponents simply cannot match it.

manager.appearance: Lean and intense, never sits, paces the whole match.
manager.bio: Drill Rashidi is a high-pressing zealot who demands relentless effort and gets it. His Drillers hound opponents from the first whistle and outlast almost everyone.
manager.playing_history: A box-to-box midfielder who ran his whole career.
manager.playing_philosophy: Press them everywhere, all the time, until they break. Effort is the only entitlement.
manager.culture: A miner who believes in graft above talent.
achievements: Built the belt's most relentless press

managing_staff.appearance: Wiry and merciless, runs the hardest sessions in the belt.
managing_staff.bio: Seam Adeyemi builds the work-rate conditioning that powers the Drillers' relentless press, the engine behind the effort.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Out-run them and you out-play them. There is no substitute for graft.

players.appearance: Alert and proactive, sweeps behind the press.
players.bio: Photon Vasquez is the balanced sweeper-keeper who covers the space the high press leaves behind.
achievements: Most defensive actions outside the box

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, presses from full-back.
players.bio: Beam Cruz is the workhorse full-back who presses higher than most wingers.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the recovery runner.
players.bio: Solar Okafor is the team-first defender fast enough to cover when the press is beaten.
achievements: Most recovery runs in the side

players.appearance: Combative and hard, leads the back-line press.
players.bio: Ray Sato is the aggressive defender who steps out to win the ball high.
achievements: Most high turnovers by a defender

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, holds the line.
players.bio: Flux Lee is the composed defender who keeps the high block organised.

players.appearance: Inventive and busy, the press's brain.
players.bio: Radiant Kim is the creative spark who makes the high turnovers count.

players.appearance: Willing and relentless, the press engine.
players.bio: Lumens Mori is the selfless midfielder who hounds the ball for ninety minutes.

players.appearance: Balanced and busy, the two-way midfielder.
players.bio: Watt Nakamura is the composed midfielder who links the press to the attack.

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, feeds on panic.
players.bio: Flare Rivera is the selfish finisher who punishes the mistakes the press forces.

players.appearance: Fierce and direct, leads from the front.
players.bio: Blaze Patel is the aggressive forward who triggers the press by hounding defenders.
achievements: Most forward pressures in the belt

players.bio: Shine Novak is the selfish forward who finishes the chaos the press creates.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Array Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Volt Anderson is the team-first deputy who maintains the press's intensity in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Panel Martinez is the promising young defender learning the Drillers' relentless ways.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Current Chandra is the creative deputy who offers a different answer from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Ampere Ito is the eager young finisher pushing for a place among the Drillers.
